channel.title: Copley Family Research Vault
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family Research Vault

item.title: GEMINI
item.description: Gemini Agent Protocol — Copley Family Research Vault This document provides foundational mandates for AI agents working on the Copley Family Research Vault.

item.title: CLAUDE
item.description: CLAUDE.md — Copley Family Research Vault This file gives AI agents instant orientation for working on this project.

item.title: Phase 2C Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2C Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Critical Site Fixes Performed The site was “broken” due to environment and configuration issues.

item.title: Phase 2D Handoff Summary
item.description: Phase 2D Handoff Summary (for next agent) 1) Work Completed This Session Image Catalog Completed All 11 previously unnamed images have been renamed, identified, and embedded in the appropriate pages.

item.title: Search Index
